languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Комм-бусина{/g} оживает встревоженным голосом Мастера Вокса.{/n} "Лорд-капитан, срочный доклад от госпожи Зауэрбэк. Странное существо, похожее на неисправного {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитора{/g}, направляется в сторону нижних палуб, крича мольбы, в которых упоминаетесь вы и генетор Фебрус. Блюстители отправились на перехват, но предполагают, что вы предпочтете лично оценить ситуацию".

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Комм-бусина{/g} оживает встревоженным голосом Мастера Вокса.{/n} "Лорд-капитан, срочный доклад от госпожи Зауэрбэк. Странное существо, похожее на неисправного {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитора{/g}, направляется в сторону нижних палуб, крича мольбы, в которых упоминаетесь вы и генетор Фебрус. Блюстители отправились на перехват, но предполагают, что вы предпочтете лично оценить ситуацию".

languages.text: {n}Your {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g} crackles to life, carrying the Vox Master's anxious voice:{/n} "Lord Captain, an urgent report from Mistress Sauerback. A strange creature resembling a malfunctioning {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} is heading toward the lower decks, shouting pleas that make reference to you and Genetor Februs. Enforcers have been dispatched to intercept it, but they assumed that you would prefer to assess the situation personally."

Enforcers have been dispatched to intercept it, but they assumed that you would prefer to assess the situation personally."

languages.text: {n}あなたの{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}通信ヘッド{/g}がパチパチと音を立てて、ヴォックス・マスターの不安げな声が聞こえてくる:{/n}「艦長様、サウアーバックから緊急の報告です。故障した{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}サービトール{/g}のような奇妙な生き物が下甲板に向かって、あなたとジェネトール・フェブルスを言及した懇願の声を上げながら進んでいます。それを迎撃するために、強襲隊が派遣されましたが、状況を自ら判断したいと考えたのでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Your {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g} crackles to life, carrying the Vox Master's anxious voice:{/n} "Lord Captain, an urgent report from Mistress Sauerback. A strange creature resembling a malfunctioning {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} is heading toward the lower decks, shouting pleas that make reference to you and Genetor Februs. Enforcers have been dispatched to intercept it, but they assumed that you would prefer to assess the situation personally."

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの通信ヘッドがパチパチと音を立てて、ヴォックス・マスターの不安げな声が聞こえてくる:{/n}「艦長様、サウアーバック女史から緊急の報告です。故障したサービトールのような奇妙な生き物が下甲板に向かって、あなたとジェネトール・フェブルスを言及した懇願の声を上げながら進んでいます。それを迎撃するために、強襲隊が派遣されましたが、状況を自ら判断したいと考えたのでしょう。」

{n}あなたの{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}通信ヘッド{/g}がパチパチと音を立てて、ヴォックス・マスターの不安げな声が聞こえてくる:{/n}「艦長様、サウアーバックから緊急の報告です。故障した{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}サービトール{/g}のような奇妙な生き物が下甲板に向かって、あなたとジェネトール・フェブルスを言及した懇願の声を上げながら進んでいます。それを迎撃するために、強襲隊が派遣されましたが、状況を自ら判断したいと考えたのでしょう。」

languages.text: {n}你的{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}通讯珠{/g}在一阵静电杂音中启动，音阵大师焦急的声音传来：{/n}“舰长大人，苏尔贝克女士发来紧急报告。一个形似故障{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}的奇异生物正朝下层甲板进发，口中还大喊着涉及您本人以及基因士费布鲁斯的恳求。执法者已前往拦截，但他们认为，您或许更希望亲自评估局势。”
languages.original_text: {n}Your {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g} crackles to life, carrying the Vox Master's anxious voice:{/n} "Lord Captain, an urgent report from Mistress Sauerback. A strange creature resembling a malfunctioning {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} is heading toward the lower decks, shouting pleas that make reference to you and Genetor Februs. Enforcers have been dispatched to intercept it, but they assumed that you would prefer to assess the situation personally."

traits.locale_text: {n}你的{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}通讯珠{/g}在一阵静电杂音中启动，音阵大师焦急的声音传来：{/n}“舰长大人，苏尔贝克女士发来紧急报告。一个形似故障{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}的奇异生物正朝下层甲板进发，口中还大喊着涉及您本人以及基因士费布鲁斯的恳求。执法者已前往拦截，但他们认为，您或许更希望亲自评估局势。”

languages.text: {n}Tu {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}cuenta de comunicación{/g} se activa con un restallido antes de transmitir la voz preocupada de la maestra de vocos:{/n} «Lord Capitán, un informe urgente de la señora Sauerback. Una extraña criatura similar a un {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidor{/g} defectuoso se dirige hacia las cubiertas inferiores, gritando súplicas en las que los menciona a usted y al genetor Februs. Ha enviado guardias para interceptarla, pero entiende que preferirá valorar la situación personalmente».
languages.original_text: {n}Your {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g} crackles to life, carrying the Vox Master's anxious voice:{/n} "Lord Captain, an urgent report from Mistress Sauerback. A strange creature resembling a malfunctioning {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} is heading toward the lower decks, shouting pleas that make reference to you and Genetor Februs. Enforcers have been dispatched to intercept it, but they assumed that you would prefer to assess the situation personally."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}cuenta de comunicación{/g} se activa con un restallido antes de transmitir la voz preocupada de la maestra de vocos:{/n} «Lord Capitán, un informe urgente de la señora Sauerback. Una extraña criatura similar a un {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidor{/g} defectuoso se dirige hacia las cubiertas inferiores, gritando súplicas en las que los menciona a usted y al genetor Februs. Ha enviado guardias para interceptarla, pero entiende que preferirá valorar la situación personalmente».

languages.text: {n}Aus deinem {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Voxstecker{/g} ertönt knisternd die ängstliche Stimme der Voxmeisterin:{/n} "Lord Captain, dringender Bericht von Meisterin Sauerback. Eine seltsame Kreatur, die an einen defekten {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitor{/g} erinnert, nähert sich den unteren Decks und brüllt irgendetwas von Euch und Genetor Februs. Enforcer sind bereits vor Ort, aber sie dachten, Ihr würdet es vielleicht vorziehen, die Lage persönlich zu bewerten."
languages.original_text: {n}Your {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g} crackles to life, carrying the Vox Master's anxious voice:{/n} "Lord Captain, an urgent report from Mistress Sauerback. A strange creature resembling a malfunctioning {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} is heading toward the lower decks, shouting pleas that make reference to you and Genetor Februs. Enforcers have been dispatched to intercept it, but they assumed that you would prefer to assess the situation personally."

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus deinem {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Voxstecker{/g} ertönt knisternd die ängstliche Stimme der Voxmeisterin:{/n} "Lord Captain, dringender Bericht von Meisterin Sauerback. Eine seltsame Kreatur, die an einen defekten {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitor{/g} erinnert, nähert sich den unteren Decks und brüllt irgendetwas von Euch und Genetor Februs. Enforcer sind bereits vor Ort, aber sie dachten, Ihr würdet es vielleicht vorziehen, die Lage persönlich zu bewerten."

languages.text: {n}Votre {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}communicateur{/g} grésille brièvement avant de laisser entendre la voix anxieuse de la maîtresse-vox :{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je vous transmets un rapport urgent de maîtresse Sauerback. Une étrange créature ressemblant à un {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} défectueux se dirige vers les ponts inférieurs, en criant des suppliques évoquant votre nom et celui du genetor Februs. Des prévôts sont partis l'intercepter, mais ils pensent que vous préféreriez évaluer vous-même la situation. »
languages.original_text: {n}Your {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g} crackles to life, carrying the Vox Master's anxious voice:{/n} "Lord Captain, an urgent report from Mistress Sauerback. A strange creature resembling a malfunctioning {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} is heading toward the lower decks, shouting pleas that make reference to you and Genetor Februs. Enforcers have been dispatched to intercept it, but they assumed that you would prefer to assess the situation personally."

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}communicateur{/g} grésille brièvement avant de laisser entendre la voix anxieuse de la maîtresse-vox :{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je vous transmets un rapport urgent de maîtresse Sauerback. Une étrange créature ressemblant à un {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} défectueux se dirige vers les ponts inférieurs, en criant des suppliques évoquant votre nom et celui du genetor Februs. Des prévôts sont partis l'intercepter, mais ils pensent que vous préféreriez évaluer vous-même la situation. »

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Mikro telsizin{/g} cızırtıyla canlanıyor. Voks Üstadı endişeyle konuşmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan, Sauerback Hanım'dan acil bir rapor aldık. Arızalı bir {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetörü{/g} andıran tuhaf bir yaratık, sizin ve Genetör Februs'un adını haykırarak alt güvertelere gidiyormuş. Yolunu kesmeleri için infazcıları gönderdik ancak durumu bizzat değerlendirmeyi tercih edeceğinizi varsaydılar."
